admissions_process.summary: ALBA publishes a graduate admissions page and an official 2026-2027 Master application PDF. The recovered source set confirms the existence of the master application process, but it does not expose a detailed graduate admissions manual beyond the official pages listed here.
steps: Review the official Admissions et Inscriptions page for graduate admissions information.
Complete the official Master application PDF for 2026-2027.
Follow any program-specific guidance published on the relevant school or institute page.
Use the student booklet or brochure for supporting graduate guidance where applicable.

required_documents.summary: The recovered ALBA source set confirms the existence of a master application form, but it does not expose a stable machine-readable graduate document checklist.
notes: The official Master application PDF confirms that applicants must read the conditions required for admission to the Master applied for.
No separate document list was captured in the discovery report for inclusion here.

language_requirements.summary: No standalone official graduate language requirement was recovered in the inspected ALBA source set.
notes: The reviewed official pages and PDFs do not publish a numeric TOEFL, IELTS, or equivalent cutoff.
Language evidence in the source set is program- and curriculum-specific rather than a university-wide graduate admission rule.

tuition_model.summary: ALBA's Admissions et Inscriptions page has a Scolarité et Frais section, but the recovered official content did not expose a machine-readable graduate tuition table. Tuition is therefore not populated here and is not inferred.
notes: Program-level tuition remains null in research/alba/programs.json.
The discovery report confirms the tuition/fees section but not a structured numeric graduate tuition table.

application_fee.notes: The official admissions page and master application PDF confirm graduate admission processing, but no numeric application fee was recovered from the inspected source set.

registration_fee.notes: The admissions page includes a Scolarité et Frais section, but no readable graduate registration amount was recovered.

payment_methods.summary: No official graduate payment-method matrix was recovered in the inspected ALBA sources.
notes: The recovered sources reference tuition/fees, but not a formal graduate payment-method table.

payment_plans.summary: No formal graduate payment-plan details were recovered in the inspected ALBA sources.
notes: The recovered source set does not expose a graduate installment schedule or deferred-payment table.

scholarships.summary: The official admissions page includes an Aide financière section, but no numeric graduate scholarship table was recovered in the inspected source set.
notes: The discovery report references a merit-scholarship search snippet, but the recovered official source text did not yield a stable numeric scholarship table.

financial_aid.summary: ALBA publishes an official financial-aid section on the admissions page, but no machine-readable graduate aid awards or amounts were recovered.
notes: The source set confirms the existence of financial-aid guidance, but not a graduate aid schedule.

academic_calendar.summary: No standalone official graduate academic calendar was recovered in the inspected ALBA source set.
notes: The booklet and brochure serve as official guidance references, but the discovery report did not recover a dedicated graduate calendar table.

graduate_regulations.summary: ALBA links an official student booklet and general brochure from its site, which serve as the recovered graduate guidance and regulations references in this pass.

international_students.summary: No dedicated graduate international-student policy page was recovered in the inspected ALBA sources.
notes: The recovered source set does not expose a separate graduate international-student checklist.

accreditation.summary: No explicit university-wide graduate accreditation statement was recovered in the inspected ALBA source set.
notes: The reviewed sources confirm ALBA's official site and brochure, but not a distinct graduate accreditation catalogue in this pass.
